ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cancer_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer case */,
  "primary_state_name" TEXT /* Primary state name */,
  "cancer" TEXT /* Type of cancer */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race and ethnicity of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age group of the patient */,
  "average_annual_count" INTEGER /* Average annual count of cancer cases */,
  "age_adjusted_rate" REAL /* Age-adjusted rate of cancer cases */,
  "county_state" TEXT /* County and state where the cancer case was reported */,
  "abbrv" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the cancer case was reported */,
  "stage_at_diagnosis" TEXT /* Stage of cancer at the time of diagnosis */,
  "survival_status" TEXT /* Survival status of the patient */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment the patient received */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hospital where the patient was treated */,
  "primary_cause_of_death" TEXT /* Primary cause of death if the patient did not survive */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the last follow-up with the patient */,
  "survival_time" INTEGER /* Survival time in months from diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state where the county is located */,
  "abbrv" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  "population_density_2015" REAL /* Population density for 2015 */,
  "population_density_2016" REAL /* Population density for 2016 */,
  "population_density_2017" REAL /* Population density for 2017 */,
  "population_density_2018" REAL /* Population density for 2018 */,
  "population_density_2019" REAL /* Population density for 2019 */,
  "hospital_count" INTEGER /* Number of hospitals in the county */,
  "clinics_count" INTEGER /* Number of clinics in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_name FOREIGN KEY ("state_name") REFERENCES states ("state_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbrv" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the state */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the state */,
  "population_density_2015" REAL /* Population density for 2015 */,
  "population_density_2016" REAL /* Population density for 2016 */,
  "population_density_2017" REAL /* Population density for 2017 */,
  "population_density_2018" REAL /* Population density for 2018 */,
  "population_density_2019" REAL /* Population density for 2019 */,
  "hospital_count" INTEGER /* Number of hospitals in the state */,
  "clinics_count" INTEGER /* Number of clinics in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each cancer case
Race and ethnicity of the patient
Average annual count of cancer cases
County and state where the cancer case was reported
Year when the cancer case was reported
Stage of cancer at the time of diagnosis
Type of treatment the patient received
Unique identifier for the hospital where the patient was treated
Primary cause of death if the patient did not survive
Date of the last follow-up with the patient
Survival time in months from diagnosis
Name of the state where the county is located
Number of hospitals in the county
Number of clinics in the county
Number of hospitals in the state
Number of clinics in the state
